description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Your TeamCity server hostname

The TeamCity REST API provides programmatic access to TeamCity CI/CD server functionality. It allows management of projects, build configurations, builds, agents, VCS roots, users, and more. The API uses locators for flexible filtering and supports both JSON and XML formats. The full API specification is available via the /app/rest/swagger.json endpoint on any TeamCity instance.
